Okay, so when you click the button below, it'll bring you to this link for a Canva file to print your poster. Now, some of you is gonna say edit design, some of you is gonna say use template, it just depends on your level of account that you have with Canva. Canva is a free service, you do not need a premium account to do this. And when you click the button, it will bring open Canva. And you may need to create an account prior to this. With this, you don't have to do anything. Now, if you wanted to edit anything, add a logo on it, you're welcome to it. But this is good to go, and all you need to do is go to the upper right, hit print poster. I would suggest the largest size, but that's just me. How many copies you'd like, how you wanna do your shipping, and you're gonna hit continue. Now, we've already done the graphic design review for you on this, so all you need to do is hit continue. And it's gonna ask you to remove all these things, you just hit continue, continue. It's gonna generate a PDF, which you're welcome to download and just print on regular printer paper as well. Once you click these two boxes, you're gonna hit continue, and it's gonna take you to your shipping and billing, and you are all set to go, and that will show up at your door.
